title: deschampsia cespitosa subsp. austrobohemica
intro: Deschampsia cespitosa subsp. austrobohemica, commonly known as hair grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Deschampsia cespitosa subsp. austrobohemica include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water.
